rewritten_requirements: The system shall be in an off state initially.
The system shall support when the user sets an alarm time, the system shall activate the alarm.
The system shall ensure that the user shall be able to turn off the activated alarm.
The system shall support when the current time matches the set alarm time, the system shall start ringing the alarm.
The system shall ensure that once the alarm is ringing, the user shall be able to stop it.
The system shall support after stopping the alarm, the system shall remain active for the next scheduled alarm time.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should start in an off condition.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The alarm starts in an off condition.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When the user sets an alarm time, the system should activate the alarm.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the user sets an alarm time, the alarm becomes active.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user should be able to turn off the activated alarm.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The user can also turn it off again if needed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When the current time matches the set alarm time, the system should start ringing the alarm.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the current time matches the set alarm time, the alarm starts ringing.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once the alarm is ringing, the user should be able to stop it.
After stopping the alarm, the system should remain active for the next scheduled alarm time.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: and the alarm remains active for the next time.
